ddls:
CREATE TABLE "senators" (
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each senator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the senator */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the senator (e.g., R, D) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State represented by the senator */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the senator */,
  "twitter_id" INTEGER /* Twitter ID of the senator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for senatorial office */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for senatorial office */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the senator's office */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the senator */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the senator's official photo */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the senator's term started */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the senator's term ends */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the senator */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the senator */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the senator */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous professional experience of the senator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media profile */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator owning the profile */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the senator on the platform */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the senator */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the senator's social media profile */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the profile was updated */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Engagement score based on likes, retweets, etc. */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_records" (
  "voting_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator casting the vote */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill being voted on */,
  "vote_cast" TEXT /* Vote cast by the senator (e.g., Yea, Nay, Abstain) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "session" TEXT /* Congressional session of the vote */,
  "congress" INTEGER /* Congress number (e.g., 117th Congress) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "amendments" TEXT /* Any amendments related to the bill */,
  "voting_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the voting process (e.g., Committee Vote, Floor Vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee assignment */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator assigned to the committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the senator within the committee (e.g., Chair, Ranking Member) */,
  "committee_type" TEXT /* Type of committee (e.g., Standing, Select) */,
  "committee_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the senator started serving on the committee */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the senator's term on the committee ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator sponsoring the bill */,
  "bill_name" TEXT /* Name of the bill */,
  "sponsor_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was sponsored */,
  "bill_type" TEXT /* Type of bill (e.g., House Bill, Senate Bill) */,
  "bill_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill (e.g., Introduced, Passed, Signed) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bill */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text of the bill */,
  "last_action_date" TEXT /* Date of the last action taken on the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "referred_to_committee" TEXT /* Committee to which the bill was referred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "co_sponsors" (
  "co_sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each co-sponsor */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being co-sponsored */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator co-sponsoring the bill */,
  "co_sponsor_date" TEXT /* Date the senator co-sponsored the bill */,
  "co_sponsor_role" TEXT /* Role of the co-sponsor (e.g., Original Co-Sponsor, Added Co-Sponsor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("co_sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_sponsors_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_co_sponsors_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_voting_records, edit_committee_assignments) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was granted */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission expires (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "senator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the senator who tweeted */,
  "tweet_text" TEXT /* Text of the tweet */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date the tweet was posted */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_senator_id FOREIGN KEY ("senator_id") REFERENCES senators ("senator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet mentioning the entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (e.g., #hashtag, @mention) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., hashtag, mention) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_entities_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., policy, politics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_tags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_record_tags" (
  "voting_record_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record tag */,
  "voting_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting record being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., healthcare, education) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_record_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_record_tags_voting_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_record_id") REFERENCES voting_records ("voting_record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_tag" (
  "committee_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee tag */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., appropriations, foreign relations) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_tag_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_tags" (
  "bill_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill tag */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., tax reform, infrastructure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_tags_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)
